result.summary: Found several visual issues, mainly horizontal clipping/overflow in navigation and game grids, a misleading game count, and content being obscured by the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: Several content areas appear horizontally cut off. The top category navigation cuts off the 'Hot Games' tab, and the rightmost game cards in the grids are partially off-screen.
issues.suggestion: Review responsive layout widths. Ensure carousels have clear horizontal scrolling behavior, proper padding, and no unintended viewport overflow. If these are grids, reduce card width or column count on mobile.

issues.description: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section shows a badge reading '0 Games' while multiple game tiles are displayed below it.
issues.suggestion: Update the count dynamically to match the visible game list, or remove the badge if the count is unavailable.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game content, causing cards near the bottom of the screen to be partially hidden.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the page content equal to the height of the fixed navigation bar.

issues.description: Carousel navigation arrows on the hero banner sit very close to the screen edges, with the right arrow appearing partially clipped.
issues.suggestion: Inset the carousel controls slightly from the viewport edge and ensure they remain fully visible on small screens.

issues.description: Some text and logos in the top header are very small, especially the partner/region branding, making them difficult to read on mobile.
issues.suggestion: Increase text/logo size where possible or simplify the header layout for small screens.
